caption_text: New arrival! Blue georgette printed straight kurti, sizes M to XL available. Rate 480/pc single, 440 for 10+, best price 400 for 50pc+ bulk. Limited stock, DM to book.
Same design in maroon also available - georgette printed kurti M-XL, rate same as blue - 480 single, bulk rate on order of 10+.
A-line floral print kurti in rayon, yellow colour, S to XXL sizes. Wholesale rate 320/pc for orders above 10 pcs. Good seller, restocking soon.
Pink version of the floral aline kurti, rayon fabric, S-XXL. Rate 320 for bulk 10pc+. Note: this colour is currently out of stock, taking advance bookings only.
Pure chikankari work kurti, cotton fabric, white colour, M to XXL. Rate 580 only, minimum 10pc order. Premium quality, selling fast!
Chikankari kurti off white shade also in stock, cotton, M-XXL sizes. Same rate 580 for 10pc+.
Pure Banarasi silk saree, red colour, free size. Rate 1350 for 10pc+ orders, single piece 1450. Very limited quantity left, hurry!
Green Banarasi silk saree, free size, rate 1350 for bulk 10pc+, stock is very limited only few left.
Linen printed saree, beige shade, free size, rate 820 for 10+ pcs. Good for summer collection.
Cotton unstitched suit set, peach colour, free size. Rate 660 for 10pc+, single piece 720.
Sky blue cotton unstitched suit, free size, rate 660 bulk 10pc+. Note from last week: this colour is selling out fast.
Chanderi embroidered suit set, mustard colour, free size, rate 900 for 10pc+ order, premium festive piece.
Chiffon dupatta multicolor, free size, rate 160 for 10pc+, great for adding to any suit set combo.
Printed kaftan style kurti, rayon, teal colour, free size, rate 375 for 10pc+ order. New design, doing well.
Long denim kurti, blue, sizes S to XL, rate 480 for 10pc+ bulk order. (Note: rate may have changed since this was posted, please confirm.)
Fresh arrival - organza saree with sequin border, wine colour, free size. Rate 990 for 10pc+, single piece 1080. Not yet added to system, ask owner for stock count.
